query:
-- Unique guest device IDs from page views today (no userId = guest)
SELECT 
  COUNT(DISTINCT deviceId) AS unique_guest_devices_today,
  COUNT(*) AS total_page_views_today
FROM pageViews
WHERE DATE(timestamp) = CURDATE()
  AND (userId IS NULL OR userId = 0);

-- Total unique devices (guests + logged in) from page views today
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT deviceId) AS total_unique_devices_today
FROM pageViews
WHERE DATE(timestamp) = CURDATE();

-- Unique guests from sessions table today
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT deviceId) AS unique_guest_sessions_today
FROM sessions
WHERE DATE(startTime) = CURDATE()
  AND (userId IS NULL OR userId = 0);

-- Total unique devices (guests + logged in) from page views today
